whole_image_visual_findings: The sample is a coherent hyperrealistic head-and-shoulders portrait with stable facial proportions, aligned eyes, believable hair, clothed blazer/shirt styling, and a coherent window/interior background.
Eye readability improves over the softer-edge matrix sample: both eyes remain visible, with clearer catchlights and less dim eye-socket shadow.
Skin texture is materially better preserved than the prior eye/microtexture follow-up; the face retains natural surface detail and does not read as heavily beauty-filtered or waxy.
No visible Canny/control-map leakage, colored stains, black contour transfer, harsh edge haloing, text, watermark, or warped jaw/collar boundary appears.
The output remains a head-and-shoulders portrait. Hands, feet, full-body anatomy, contact points, and broad multi-seed robustness are not certified.

improvement_over_matrix: Eyes are clearer and less shadowed while preserving the preferred softer-edge candidate's natural, non-harsh edge behavior.
improvement_over_prior_mixed_followup: Skin texture is less beauty-polished and retains more natural facial material detail.
remaining_notes: Minor polish remains in facial surface, and the sample is still only a single local head-and-shoulders output.

decision.certification_boundary: Local quality-development candidate only. This does not certify target-runtime EC2 behavior, broad robustness, hands/full-body anatomy, or final MOD-17 completion.
